title: Avoid Creating Arrays for Varargs Parameters
description: There's no point in creating an array solely for the purpose of passing it as a varargs (...) argument; varargs is an array. Simply pass the elements directly. They will be consolidated into an array automatically. Incidentally passing an array where Object ... is expected makes the intent ambiguous: Is the array supposed to be one object or a collection of objects?
recommendation: Pass the elements directly instead of creating an array
impact: Ambiguity in code intent and potential security vulnerabilities
